[[File:Achtryn chathead.png|left]]
'''Achtryn''' is a [[Slayer master]] who temporarily replaces [[Mazchna]] during the events of [[While Guthix Sleeps]]. According to him, it has been a while since he was last asked to fill in for Mazchna, whom he considers to be a "mine of information."

Achtryn gives tasks to players with a [[Combat level]] of 20 and above. He is located in north-eastern [[Canifis]]. Achtryn is notable for giving [[Slayer task|Slayer tasks]] close to his area. His tasks are relatively easy and ideal for players with lower combat levels.

==Slayer points==
Players can receive [[Slayer reward point]]s for completing [[Slayer task]]s—this is based on how many tasks players have accomplished in a row. Completion of a task assigned by Achtryn will grant you:
{| class=wikitable style="text-align:center;"
!Task interval
!Points given
|-
|Every task
|6
|-
|Every 10th
|30
|-
|Every 50th
|90
|-
|Every 100th
|150
|-
|Every 250th
|210
|-
|Every 1,000th
|300
|}
As of the August 27, 2025 update, Slayer masters can have different block lists, each with different costs. Achtryn's blocks cost 50 Slayer points.
